overall.description: A first-person video game scene depicting a rainy drive along a highway shoulder beneath a massive concrete interchange. The camera moves steadily forward past metal guardrails while vehicles periodically overtake on the right, and large illuminated billboards become visible through the downpour.

events.description: blue sports car overtakes on the right side highway lane
large illuminated billboard becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the highway shoulder next to metal guardrails in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: blue sports car speeding past on the main highway lane

entered.detail: continuous metal barrier with red reflective markings separating the shoulder from the embankment
massive multi-level concrete highway overpass structure looming ahead through the rain
tall metal pole with dual overhead lamps illuminating the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked highway shoulder with metal guardrails running along the left. Through the heavy downpour, a complex concrete interchange structure is visible in the distance. A blue sports car overtakes on the right, and as the camera advances, a large billboard begins to emerge on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with large advertising billboard

events.description: black van passes by on the right highway lane
yellow car overtakes on the right
approaching the overpass structure, road narrows slightly under the interchange

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder while passing the prominent billboard on the right

notable_agents.action: black van driving past on the main highway lane

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying boxing advertisement with text FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS and Nogo branding

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the initial street light and approaches the massive interchange. A large billboard advertising boxing dominates the right side of the frame, glowing brightly against the grey rain. Multiple vehicles including a black van and yellow car overtake on the right as the concrete overpass structure grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: under highway interchange with concrete pillars

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the multi-level overpass
red car passes under the overpass ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: driving under the massive concrete interchange structure, passing between large support pillars

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead highway decks, creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive concrete interchange, entering a semi-covered zone where the sky is mostly obscured by highway decks above. The billboard recedes behind as the scene becomes dominated by thick concrete support pillars. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural grey light and artificial street lamps, with vehicles continuing to pass intermittently on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-slicked highway shoulder that transitions from an open, stormy road into the oppressive shadow of a massive concrete interchange. It begins beside metal guardrails in a heavy downpour, moving past a blue sports car as a large billboard first emerges through the grey haze. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal a brightly glowing boxing advertisement and a stream of overtaking vehicles, including a black van and a yellow car, while the concrete overpass looms larger ahead. The perspective then shifts as the camera passes under the interchange, entering a semi-covered zone where the sky is obscured by highway decks and the environment is dominated by thick concrete support pillars. Finally, the lighting blends natural grey tones with artificial street lamps as the billboard recedes and the camera continues its steady progress beneath the urban structure.
